Class HistoryButton.HistoryPopup

java.lang.Object
javafx.stage.Window
javafx.stage.PopupWindow
javafx.scene.control.PopupControl
com.dlsc.gemsfx.CustomPopupControl
com.dlsc.gemsfx.HistoryButton.HistoryPopup
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget, javafx.scene.control.Skinnable
Enclosing class:
HistoryButton<T>
public class HistoryButton.HistoryPopup extends CustomPopupControl
The popup used by the HistoryButton to display a list view with the previously used items.
